pages.name: page_home
pages.label: Home
pages.description: SaaS landing hero with headline 'Automate your workflow at the speed of thought' sliding in from left; hero dashboard mockup placeholder sliding in from right; 3 feature cards with staggered fade-in; live metrics counter simulation with pulse animation; client logos strip with infinite scroll animation.

pages.name: page_features
pages.label: Features
pages.description: Deep-dive features page; 6 alternating left/right sections; each text block slides in from the side while the corresponding diagram placeholder fades in; interactive-looking comparison table with hover row highlights.

pages.name: page_pricing
pages.label: Pricing
pages.description: 3 pricing tiers (Starter, Pro, Enterprise); Pro tier card is highlighted and animates with a subtle scale-up and glowing blue border; FAQ section with animated expand/collapse arrows.

pages.name: page_docs
pages.label: Documentation
pages.description: Documentation layout with left sidebar and right content area; sidebar links slide in from left; code snippet boxes with animated copy button tooltips; step-by-step quickstart guide with staggered fade-in.

pages.name: page_contact
pages.label: Contact
pages.description: Contact sales form with smooth slide-up animation; office locations grid with bouncing pin icon placeholders; support ticket CTA banner with gradient background animation.
